title: Shot
description: A single shot attempt. Coordinates are normalised to [0, 1] on both axes where (0, 0) is the attacking team's defensive corner and (1, 1) is the attacking corner of the goal being attacked. If x or y is present, the other must also be present (enforced at runtime in validators.py).

x.description: Normalised X coordinate (attacking direction). Must be present if y is present.

y.description: Normalised Y coordinate (width). Must be present if x is present.

body_part.description: Body part used. Free-form 'other' covers chest, shoulder, unusual cases.

player_id.description: Optional Player.id of the shot taker.
